title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI displays firmware versions, update availability with release notes links, and Update/Update All buttons for headsets and connected components, with a note for components requiring PC app updates.
steps: Open the Software Update UI on the headset.
Observe the displayed information for a single headset configuration.
Verify the current firmware version is shown.
Check for the 'Update Available' link with the latest firmware version.
Confirm the link navigates to the release notes.
For headsets with a charge stand or earbuds with a charge case, observe the additional UI elements.
Verify an 'Update All' button is present.
Check that current firmware versions for both components are displayed.
Confirm update availability with release notes links for each component.
Locate individual Update buttons for each component.
For components that do not support DFU via mobile (e.g., Emu/Tern), verify a note is displayed informing the user to update via the PC app.
expected: The Software Update UI correctly displays all relevant information based on the headset configuration: current firmware versions, update availability with release notes links, Update buttons, and an Update All button where applicable. Components not supporting DFU via mobile show a note to update via the PC app.
